mapper.sql: SELECT a.as_id, a.device_id, a.user_id, a.rental_id, a.status_as, a.type_as, a.receipt_date, a.receipt_details, a.checker_name, a.collection_date, a.manager_name, a.repair_details, a.completion_date, a.redispatch_date, a.created_at, b.branch_id, b.branch_name, dm.model_name, u.user_name, d.dispatch_date FROM device_as a JOIN branch b ON a.branch_id = b.branch_id LEFT JOIN device d ON a.device_id = d.device_id LEFT JOIN device_model dm ON d.model_id = dm.model_id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.user_id
mapper.select: WHERE a.device_id = #{deviceId} AND a.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device_as (device_id, branch_id, status_as, type_as, receipt_date, receipt_details, checker_name, collection_date, manager_name, repair_details, completion_date, redispatch_date, user_id, rental_id, created_at) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{branchId}, IFNULL(#{statusAs}, 0), IFNULL(#{typeAs}, 0), #{receiptDate}, #{receiptDetails}, #{checkerName}, #{collectionDate}, #{managerName}, #{repairDetails}, #{completionDate}, #{redispatchDate}, #{userId}, #{rentalId}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE device_as SET status_as = 9 WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND status_as NOT IN (3, 4, 9) AND deleted_at IS NULL
